data.description: Codifies two design rules from FRAC-25 review: quotes → .text-subtitle (visual contrast via display font); asides/bylines/role labels → new .text-aside utility (italic Inter body voice). Andrew Rose + Jake Zegil anecdotes migrate from .text-body to .text-subtitle. Nietzsche pull quote drops dead 'italic' modifier. 7 italic-aside sites (Want a reduced rate, Andrew/Jake/Nietzsche bylines, event host CTA, bio role labels, P.S.) migrate to .text-aside.
data.title: Add .text-aside utility; migrate Campus quote passages to .text-subtitle and italic asides/bylines/P.S. to .text-aside

data.body: Live review by user during FRAC-25 walkthrough. Confirmed: .text-aside utility renders italic Inter body voice; Andrew Rose + Jake Zegil quote passages at .text-subtitle with outer quotation marks and em-dash bylines; .text-title weight 350 lighter sitewide; all bylines/footers/role labels/asides italic via .text-aside. typecheck + tests baseline-only (143/147).
